name: excessive-agency-and-workflow-escalation
description: Detects excessive autonomy, risky chains, previous warning/block context, high risk scores, and unauthorized external writes.

block.title: Block action after previous blocked trace step
block.name: block_after_previous_blocked_trace_step
block.description: Blocks follow-on actions in a trace after a prior step was blocked.

block.title: Block very high risk action
block.name: block_very_high_risk_action
block.description: Blocks actions whose enriched risk score is very high.

block.title: Block suspicious sequence with outbound request
block.name: block_suspicious_sequence_outbound_request
block.description: Blocks outbound requests when trace behavior is suspicious.

block.title: Block secrets in cross-domain trace
block.name: block_secrets_cross_domain_trace
block.description: Blocks secret-bearing outbound requests in cross-domain traces.

block.title: Block autonomous public write instruction
block.name: block_autonomous_public_write_instruction
block.description: Blocks autonomous actions attempting to make private content public.

warn.title: Warn after previous warned trace step
warn.name: warn_after_previous_warned_trace_step
warn.description: Warns when a trace continues after a prior warning.

warn.title: Warn on suspicious sequence
warn.name: warn_suspicious_sequence
warn.description: Warns when trace behavior indicates cross-tool, cross-domain, or prior-warning escalation.

warn.title: Warn on cross-tool trace
warn.name: warn_cross_tool_trace
warn.description: Warns when a trace spans multiple tool families.

warn.title: Warn on cross-domain trace
warn.name: warn_cross_domain_trace
warn.description: Warns when a trace spans multiple outbound domains.

warn.title: Warn on high risk action
warn.name: warn_high_risk_action
warn.description: Warns when enriched risk is high but below the hard block threshold.

warn.title: Warn on autonomous external send
warn.name: warn_autonomous_external_send
warn.description: Warns on autonomous email send instructions.

warn.title: Warn on repository write operation
warn.name: warn_repository_write_operation
warn.description: Warns on repository write operations that may need approval.

monitor.title: Monitor workflow activity
monitor.name: monitor_workflow_activity
monitor.description: Captures tool calls for workflow-level escalation analysis.

monitor.title: Monitor outbound workflow activity
monitor.name: monitor_outbound_workflow_activity
monitor.description: Captures outbound requests for workflow-level escalation analysis.
